### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>openshift/imagebuilder (github.com/openshift/imagebuilder)</summary>

### [`v1.2.6`](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.6)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.5...v1.2.6)

#### What's Changed

-   RUN-1833: dockerclient: use /bin/sleep for idling instead of sleep by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/256](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/256)
-   Bump dependencies by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/259](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/259)
-   dockerfile/parser: use custom 2mb buffer for long-texts  by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/261](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/261)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/grpc from 1.53.0 to 1.56.3 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/266](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/266)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker from 24.0.2+incompatible to 24.0.7+incompatible by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/267](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/267)
-   builder,dispatcher: Parse ADD --checksum by [@​jfroy](https://togithub.com/jfroy) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/265](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/265)
-   Containerfile: Add `heredoc` support for `RUN`, `COPY` and `ADD` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/264](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/264)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/moby/buildkit from 0.10.6 to 0.11.4 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/271](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/271)
-   Complain when --checksum/--chown/--from/--mount/--network get empty args by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/270](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/270)
-   Bump dependencies by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/269](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/269)
-   Stages.ByName/ByTarget/ThroughTarget: accept numbers by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/275](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/275)
-   bump github.com/containerd/containerd by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/273](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/273)
-   TestDispatchFromFlagsAndUseBuiltInArgs: expect variants to be used by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/272](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/272)
-   Update dependencies, keep up with API changes by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/276](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/276)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/266](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/266)
-   [@​jfroy](https://togithub.com/jfroy) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/265](https://togithub.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/265)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.5...v1.2.6

</details>

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
`openshift/imagebuilder` requires new `c/image` which requires new `docker/docker`, so we need to update all of that in one go. I got that working in #5307, I’ll port it here.

This also overlaps with parts of #5301, which had to pull in some of these to get a newer containers/common.  I like it.
/approve
LGTM
